title: lass cordifolia
intro: Lass cordifolia, also known as Asclepias cordifolia, is a perennial plant native to the western coast of North America, belonging to the milkweed family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include treating wounds, reducing inflammation, and relieving pain. The health benefits of Lass cordifolia include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and act as an anti-inflammatory agent. Herbal preparations of Lass cordifolia include infusions, tinctures, and salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
